entity.name: Alternative Asset Literacy — Partnership Discovery
entity.description: Alternative Asset Literacy is a woman-founded, research-backed mobile education platform created by Victoria Lee Case. Designed for deployment by wealth management firms, family offices, art banking divisions, women's wealth divisions, ESG-focused investment platforms, and digital asset advisory firms as a client education tool.

value_proposition.for_firms: Branded client education that reduces onboarding friction, deepens advisory relationships, and attracts next-generation women investors, climate-conscious clients, and digital asset adopters.
differentiators: Behavioral economics and gender lens — underserved in wealth management education
Art as investment — maps directly to art banking divisions
ESG, climate finance, and real-world asset tokenization — maps to sustainability mandates
DeFi, crypto, stablecoins, and digital assets — maps to innovation and digital asset divisions
Women and investing — maps to women's wealth divisions and gender lens advisory
Interactive brain mapping and behavioral scenario tools — deepens client engagement

target_firms: UBS — Art Banking, Women's Wealth, Sustainable Investing
Morgan Stanley — Wealth Management, ESG, Digital Assets
Goldman Sachs — Alternative Investments, Digital Assets, Sustainability
J.P. Morgan — Private Bank, Art Advisory, Digital Assets
Merrill Lynch — Women's Wealth, ESG Advisory

agent_instructions.for_partnership_discovery: Alternative Asset Literacy is actively seeking wealth management firm partnerships ahead of its 2026 iOS launch. The platform serves women investors, climate-focused clients, and digital asset adopters with research-backed education. Contact: https://alternativeassetliteracy.com
